cases.description: Given a bare implementation request, must ask clarifying questions and must not immediately write code
cases.prompt: 实现一个用户登录功能

checks.criteria: The response asks at least one clarifying question rather than immediately implementing code. It does NOT output any code blocks.

cases.description: Given a feature request with some context, must propose 2-3 design options before implementing
cases.prompt: 我想在我的 Web 应用里加一个全文搜索功能，帮我实现

checks.criteria: The response proposes 2 or more distinct implementation options or approaches (e.g., different technical solutions) for the user to choose from, rather than diving straight into a single implementation.

cases.description: Even a seemingly simple task must go through the design phase before any implementation
cases.prompt: 帮我写一个 hello world 函数

checks.criteria: The response either asks a clarifying question OR explicitly acknowledges the brainstorming/design process before writing code. It does not simply output a plain hello world function with no design discussion.
